title: SAGE interface
subtitle: Export your upstream payroll data to SAGE (in addition to the native NexusRH payroll engine).

config.title: Export settings
config.enabled: Enable the SAGE interface for this tenant
config.note: Amounts are exported as whole FCFA. The file is UTF-8 (BOM) encoded for correct opening in SAGE / Excel.

exports.title: Generate an export
exports.periodRequired: Enter a period for this export.
exports.employeesDesc: Employee records (staff number, civil status, contract, base salary, CNPS…).
exports.variableElementsDesc: Bonuses, overtime and deductions for the period.
exports.payrollDesc: Gross, contributions, income tax and net pay for the period.
